document.title: Component Certificate of Conformity
document.documentType: IECEE CB Scheme Component Certificate of Conformity

sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Scheme component certificate for H&abyz GT1717C and GT1717CP digital flat panel X-ray detector component/sub-assembly.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence of electrical and mechanical safety conformity to listed IEC 60601 standards, with compliance limited to clauses addressed in the accompanying test report and requiring end-product evaluation.
keyPoints: Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Model/type references are GT1717C and GT1717CP.
Test report reference is ACTS-2025-SM-261 issued on 2025-11-11.
Certificate date is 2025-11-14 and signature name is Thomas Wilson.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision or version is not present in the source text.

Issuing National Certification Body is not explicitly named in a single clean field; UL Solutions entities are listed and UL Solutions (Demko) appears relevant from the DK reference and Denmark listing.
Source metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic, but the source text identifies an IECEE CB Scheme certificate and UL Solutions entities.
OCR/text quality issue: the sentence after 'certifies that the above have been found to be in' contains corrupted text ('te standard').
